item-02.justification: Visible name 'see more' conveys no destination; not suppressed, not floor-caught.

item-03.justification: 'learn more' is a canonical generic name with no destination context; floor only catches missing names.

item-06.message: Link text is a raw file path.
item-06.justification: Visible name is the file path itself, meaningless when announced; name present so floor's no-name rule misses.

item-07.message: Link text is a raw URL.
item-07.justification: Visible name is a raw URL, unreadable to screen readers; name present so floor misses.

item-08.message: Link text is a raw URL with query string.
item-08.justification: Visible name is a raw URL plus tracking query, noisy and meaningless; name present.

item-09.message: Link text is a file path with query string.
item-09.justification: Visible name is a path plus token query, noisy and meaningless; name present.

item-10.justification: Canonical generic link-text failure; name present so floor's no-name rule misses.

item-11.justification: 'read more' canonical generic; present-but-meaningless name, not floor territory.

item-12.justification: 'read more' canonical generic; MUI Link resolves to anchor with present name, floor misses.

item-14.justification: 'here' is a canonical generic name; not suppressed, not in static findings.

item-15.justification: 'view more' is a non-descriptive generic phrase (same family as 'see more'); name present so floor misses.

item-16.justification: 'click' alone conveys no destination; present name, not floor-caught.

item-22.message: Link text is a raw filename.
item-22.justification: Visible name is a filename, meaningless to a screen reader; name present so floor's no-name rule misses.

item-23.message: Link text is a raw filename.
item-23.justification: Visible name is a messy filename, not a human-readable destination; name present.

item-24.justification: Canonical generic 'learn more'; name present, floor misses.

item-25.message: Link text is a file path with query string.
item-25.justification: Visible name is a path plus query, noisy/polluted name; name present.

item-28.message: Link text is a raw URL.
item-28.justification: Visible name is a full raw URL, unreadable when announced; name present.

item-29.message: Link text is a raw URL with query string.
item-29.justification: Visible name is a CDN URL plus query, noisy/meaningless; name present.

item-30.justification: 'this link' is a non-descriptive generic phrase conveying no destination.

item-31.message: Link text is a raw path.
item-31.justification: Visible name is a bare path segment, not a human-readable destination.

item-32.message: Link text is a raw SKU.
item-32.justification: Visible name is a product SKU code, meaningless to a screen-reader user.

item-36.justification: 'more info' is a generic vague phrase with no destination context.

item-39.justification: Canonical generic 'click here'; react-router Link resolves to anchor, name present.

item-40.justification: Canonical generic 'read more'; name present so floor's no-name rule misses.

item-41.message: Link text 'find out more' is generic.
item-41.justification: 'find out more' is a generic vague phrase, same family as 'read more'.

item-43.justification: 'details' is a canonical generic link name.

item-46.message: Alt is a generic slider placeholder.
item-46.justification: alt='Slider Image 4' is an auto-generated placeholder, not image content; alt present so floor's missing-alt rule misses.

item-47.justification: alt='pim_bu_100093' is a PIM id, meaningless to a screen reader; alt present.

item-49.justification: alt='DSC_0042' is a camera-generated id, conveys no content.

item-50.justification: alt='image123.png' is a filename, meaningless to a screen reader.

item-51.justification: alt='IMG_4821.jpg' is a camera filename, conveys no content; alt present so floor misses.

item-54.justification: 'go' alone is meaningless out of context; present name, not floor-caught.

item-55.justification: Canonical generic 'click here'; name present, floor misses.
